# APEX IT

> APEX IT is a Kuala Lumpur-based IT solutions provider serving Malaysian businesses since 2006. Services include website creation, workflow automation, company profile design, IT support and repair, credit recovery, and certified IT Asset Disposition (ITAD).

## Services
- [Website Creation](/sitesecure/): Professional websites built for brand representation and conversion.
- Automated Workflows: Elimination of repetitive tasks through process automation.
- Company Profile Design: Professionally crafted brand profiles for B2B credibility.
- IT Support & Repair: On-site and remote hardware/software support with 4-hour SLA.
- Credit Recovery: Structured debt recovery and credit management for businesses.
- ITAD: Certified IT Asset Disposition with secure data destruction and compliant recycling.

## About
- 18+ years in business, serving Klang Valley businesses since 2006
- 200+ projects delivered
- 98% client satisfaction
- 50+ enterprise clients
- 4-hour response SLA
- 99.9% uptime
- 0 recorded breaches
